name: Vegetarian Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Cups Kidney Beans, Canned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tomatoes and reserve the liquid.
2. Chop the tomatoes coarsely and set aside.
3. Bring 1 cup of the reserved liquid to a boil over medium heat. Remove the pan from heat and stir in the bulgur.
4. Heat oil in a heavy, deep skillet over medium-low heat.
5. Add onion and cook until translucent, about 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Add tomatoes, celery, carrots, lemon juice, and spices. Cook until vegetables are almost tender, about 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Add green peppers and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
8. Mix in bulgur, kidney beans, garbanzo beans, and 2 cups of tomato juice.
9. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add more tomato liquid if necessary.
